The '''GA information analysis droid''' was created by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] for peaceful purposes. Scientific- and business-oriented users were often impressed with the speed of the unit.

The model was later upgraded with expanded memory and a new analysis software package in order to be used in a military capacity.

The GA series was eventually surpassed by the [[GY-I information analysis droid]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
